content: Curiosity-driven intrinsic rewards in autonomous agents can be repurposed as a regularization signal for online meta-learning memory consolidation, where intrinsic reward signals prioritize consolidating memory traces of high-impact new tasks that align with the agent’s existing knowledge manifold, naturally mitigating catastrophic forgetting by avoiding disruptive overwriting of low-curiosity (well-learned) old task weights.
source_topics: Online meta-learning memory consolidation with catastrophic forgetting mitigation
trigger_topic: Online meta-learning memory consolidation with catastrophic forgetting mitigation
